name: seccloud
description: This repo contains a synthetic-first PoC for a BYOC insider-risk substrate and thin investigation workflow.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run lint:web && npm run format:check
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix src tests && uv run ruff format src tests && eslint web/src --ext .js,.jsx --fix && npm run format
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check src tests && uv run ruff format --check src tests
scripts.format: uv run ruff format src tests && prettier --write "web/**/*.{js,jsx,css,html}" eslint.config.js .pre-commit-config.yaml "*.{json,md}"
